_about: Phase 4 — Tournament-themed quests for the ivx_quest catalog. POST each entry to quests-economy-api /quests/create on deploy. Quest IDs use a `qv_tourn_*` namespace so they're easy to filter out post-launch if engagement underperforms.

quests.title: Step Into the Arena
quests.description: Enter your first QuizVerse tournament — daily, weekly, or special event.

quests.title: Tournament Triple
quests.description: Enter 3 tournaments in a single week. Variety pays.

quests.title: Bring Your Crew
quests.description: Get a friend to pre-enroll using your invite link. Both of you earn rewards.

quests.title: Founder Member
quests.description: Lock in a Founder spot before the July 1 launch — 2× rewards on your first tournament win.
